meta.dc:title: 119 HR 4446 ENR: To amend title 38, United States Code, to modify the conditions under which the Secretary of Veterans Affairs is required to redevelop the individualized vocational rehabilitation plan for a veteran, and for other purposes.
meta.dc:creator: United States House of Representatives
meta.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

preface.congress: One Hundred Nineteenth Congress of the United States of America
preface.session: A T T H E F I R S T S E S S I O N
preface.enrolledDateline: Begun and held at the City of Washington on Friday, the third day of January, two thousand and twenty-five

longTitle.officialTitle: To amend title 38, United States Code, to modify the conditions under which the Secretary of Veterans Affairs is required to redevelop the individualized vocational rehabilitation plan for a veteran, and for other purposes.

enactingFormula.i: Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representa­tives of the United States of America in Congress assembled,

section.heading: SHORT TITLE.
section.content: This Act may be cited as the “Focused Assistance and Skills Training for Veterans’ Employment and Transition Success Act” or the “FAST VETS Act”.

section.heading: CONDITIONS UNDER WHICH SECRETARY OF VETERANS AFFAIRS SHALL REDEVELOP INDIVIDUALIZED VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION PLAN.
section.chapeau: Section 3107 of title 38, United States Code, is amended in subsection (b)—

paragraph.content: by striking “The Secretary shall review” and inserting “(1) The Secretary shall review”;
by striking the second sentence; and

by adding at the end the following new paragraph:“(2) On the basis of such review, the Secretary shall—“(A) redevelop such plan with such veteran if the Secretary determines the achievement of the long-range rehabilitation goals for such veteran is—“(i) no longer feasible due to changes in the employment handicap of the veteran; and “(ii) likelier under a different plan formulated under subsection (a); or
“(B) disapprove redevelopment of such plan if the Secretary determines such redevelopment is not appropriate.”
.

signature.role: Speaker of the House of Representatives.
Vice President of the United States and President of the Senate.
